description: This pipeline filters the paths by their name or absolute path and lists all files in a folder. The main steps involve filtering the paths and then listing all files.

afbae2e1-e93a-4b6c-96ff-d0acf23c7d32.name: folder-list-files
afbae2e1-e93a-4b6c-96ff-d0acf23c7d32.description: Lists all files in the input folder

550dacf6-c9df-4d7e-856b-c70daeb420c2.name: image-properties-to-annotation
550dacf6-c9df-4d7e-856b-c70daeb420c2.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.

d64dab14-eb45-4a7b-83f3-1aeb270f3bc8.name: path-filter
d64dab14-eb45-4a7b-83f3-1aeb270f3bc8.description: Filters the paths (files/folders) by their name or absolute path

9aa0efd7-bcc3-41b5-a346-fa15e23c694b.name: annotate-split-by-annotation
9aa0efd7-bcc3-41b5-a346-fa15e23c694b.description: Splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value.

1095c2b6-331f-453d-bf06-811bc113e710.name: path-filter
1095c2b6-331f-453d-bf06-811bc113e710.description: Filters the paths (files/folders) by their name or absolute path

396f4183-84a8-4ec1-b261-7fdef9ecd5a0.name: import-imagej-imgplus-from-file
396f4183-84a8-4ec1-b261-7fdef9ecd5a0.description: Loads an image via the native ImageJ functions.

d9f290cd-6685-4a25-83c4-80dc6eac060f.name: ij1-color-split-channels-2
d9f290cd-6685-4a25-83c4-80dc6eac060f.description: Splits multichannel images into multiple greyscale images. This operation is applied for each 2D image slice.
